methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the effect of incubation time, germination media, and germination technique on pollen tube length.

steps.description: Analysis of variance was performed to analyze the effect of incubation time, germination media, and germination technique on pollen tube length.
steps.searchable_summary: perform ANOVA to assess effects on pollen tube length

steps.description: Diagnostic plots were used to check linearity (residual vs. fitted plot), normality (normal Q-Q plot), homoscedasticity (scale location plot), and influential observations (residual vs. leverage plot).
steps.searchable_summary: generate diagnostic plots for ANOVA assumptions

steps.description: Multiple comparisons were either performed using Fisher's least significant difference test using agricolae:LSD.test, if the sample size and variance were equal, or the Games-Howell test using userfriendlyscience:oneway combined with multcompView:multcompLetters, if the sample size and variances were unequal.
steps.searchable_summary: perform multiple comparisons using LSD or Games-Howell test

steps.description: A six-number summary statistic was calculated for the second and third datasets using plyr:ddply.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate six-number summary statistics

steps.description: PCA was performed on 12 variables using FactoMineR:PCA.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCA on dataset

steps.description: Bartlett's test of sphericity and the Kaiser-Meyer-Olkin test of sampling adequacy were run before PCA analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: run Bartlett's and KMO tests before PCA

steps.description: Hierarchical clustering of principal components was performed using FactoMineR:HCPC.
steps.searchable_summary: perform hierarchical clustering on PCA results

steps.description: A decision tree was created using party:ctree.
steps.searchable_summary: create decision tree model

steps.description: All plots were created using factoextra:fviz_dend, factoextra:fviz_cluster, ggplot2:ggplot, and ggpubr:ggarrange.
steps.searchable_summary: create visualizations using ggplot2 and factoextra

methods.description: Comparison of four germination techniques to determine their effect on pollen tube growth.

steps.description: Agar plates were made by autoclaving 100 g L−1 sucrose, 25 mg L−1 boric acid, and 10 g L−1 agar in distilled water for 60 min at 105°C.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare agar plates with sucrose, boric acid, and agar

steps.description: Plates were poured after the medium cooled down to approximately 65°C, dried for 6 h under a sterile laminar flow hood, and stored at 4°C until further use.
steps.searchable_summary: pour and store agar plates

steps.description: Acclimated pollen was transferred to a 100 µL cell strainer and sprinkled over the agar plates using a fine brush.
steps.searchable_summary: apply pollen to agar plates

steps.description: A liquid germination medium containing 100 g L−1 sucrose and 25 mg L−1 boric acid was used for the germination techniques that utilized a pollen suspension.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare liquid germination medium

steps.description: For hanging and sitting drops, three O-rings were evenly spaced onto a microscopy slide. One drop (20 µL) of the pollen suspension was pipetted into each O-ring center.
steps.searchable_summary: set up hanging and sitting drop slides

steps.description: A second microscopy slide was placed on top of the O-rings, and two binder clips were used to seal the two slides.
steps.searchable_summary: seal slides with binder clips

steps.description: Slides for the sitting drop techniques were left in the original position, while slides for the hanging drop were flipped so that the drops faced downward.
steps.searchable_summary: orient slides for hanging and sitting drop techniques

steps.description: All samples were dark-incubated at 25°C for 2 h.
steps.searchable_summary: incubate samples in the dark

methods.method_name: Effects of Incubation Time, Germination Media, and Germination Technique on Pollen Tube Growth
methods.description: Investigation of the effects of incubation temperatures, germination media, and germination techniques on pollen tube growth of apple cultivars.

steps.description: Investigate the effects of eight incubation temperatures, seven germination media, and four germination techniques on pollen tube growth.
steps.searchable_summary: test various conditions on pollen tube growth

steps.description: Select an appropriate incubation time to ensure the compatibility of the results.
steps.searchable_summary: determine optimal incubation time

steps.description: Use Brewbaker and Kwack media as a standard germination medium for in vitro pollen germination experiments.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare Brewbaker and Kwack media
